core_principles: Define a specific color palette that aligns with Echoes Marketing's brand identity, incorporating a navy accent gold palette
Utilize the Stable Diffusion model for generating high-quality images with fine-grained control over the color palette
Craft well-designed prompts that incorporate the navy accent gold palette to generate brand-consistent imagery
Create custom color palette embeddings using the CLIP model to condition the Stable Diffusion model
Refine generated images using the DALL-E model to ensure they meet the Echoes Marketing brand standards
operational_workflow: Select and fine-tune the Stable Diffusion model for generating brand-consistent imagery
Craft and refine prompts using the T5 model to incorporate the navy accent gold palette
Create custom color palette embeddings using the CLIP model
Generate images using the Stable Diffusion model with the custom color palette embeddings
Refine generated images using the DALL-E model

failure_modes.failure: Generated images do not meet brand standards
failure_modes.cause: Inadequate prompt design or color palette embeddings
failure_modes.prevention: Refine prompts and color palette embeddings, and adjust model parameters as needed

prompt_templates.standard: Generate an image of a {object} with a navy blue background, gold accents, and a modern font
prompt_templates.high_quality: Create a high-quality image of a {object} with intricate details, a navy blue background, gold accents, and a modern font
prompt_templates.fast: Quickly generate an image of a {object} with a navy blue background and gold accents

benchmark_criteria: Color palette consistency with the Echoes Marketing brand identity
Overall aesthetic appeal and brand consistency
update_triggers: Changes to the Echoes Marketing brand identity or color palette
Availability of new or improved open diffusion models
User feedback or performance metrics indicating the need for refinement
learning_emphasis: How to generate brand-consistent imagery for Echoes Marketing using open diffusion models with navy accent gold palette
